Draft Proposal: “Parallel SHA 256 Lineag.filename: Draft Proposal: “Parallel SHA 256 Lineage for Future Proof Git Repositories”

description: This proposal introduces a parallel SHA 256 repository model that allows projects to begin accumulating SHA 256 native history today without disrupting existing SHA 1 workflows. The SHA 256 repository is not a conversion, not a rewrite, and not interoperating with the SHA 1 repository. It is a separate repository that receives file level mirrored commits derived from the SHA 1 repo’s working tree. This creates a future ready SHA 256 lineage while preserving full compatibility with the current Git ecosystem.
